Fields.Description: The weapon animation category. Determines the base animation set the weapon uses.

Fields.Name: Weapon Idle Animation Set: 2H

Fields.Description: The base repel value when attacking. Compared against enemy repel defense value.

Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon be buffed via a tool or spell.

Fields.Description: If ON, applies attack correction based on humanity.

Fields.Name: Is Reinforcable
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon can be reinforced via the reinforcement mechanic.

Fields.Name: Disable Weapon Job Change
Fields.Description: If ON, prevents the weapon from being changed fundamentally via the ascension mechanic or infusion mechanic.

Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon cannot be repaired.

Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon is considered a 'Dark Hand'.

Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon uses a simple model for the DLC.

Fields.Name: Is Light Source
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon is considered a light source.

Fields.Name: Is Anti-Ghost Weapon
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon can hit 'Ghost' characters.

Fields.Description: The weapon job category (e.g. ascension or infusion). Used to display the attribute icon.

Fields.Name: Is Dragon-Hunter Weapon
Fields.Description: If ON, is considered a 'dragon-hunter' weapon.

Fields.Name: Can Deposit
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be deposited into the repository.

Fields.Description: If ON, this item cannot be dropped in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be discarded.

Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be dropped.

Fields.Name: Can Lock-on through Cover (Missiles only)
Fields.Description: If ON, and this weapon is a missle weapon, then lock-on will work through walls.

Fields.Name: Is Purgable
Fields.Description: If ON, this weapon can be 'purged', e.g. dropped and no longer usable for the rest of the mission.
